en: Okay, accent challenge specifically for Americans. So, if you're American, please duet me and say
these following words. We're going to start off with boys' names because we say these quite
differently, I believe. So, first name, how would you say Graham? Graham. Graham. Okay,
how would you say the name Craig? Craig.
Okay, now next, how would you say the word Parmesan? Parmesan, like Parmesan cheese.
And next, how would you say this brand? I would say Nike. Nike. Nike. And then another brand,
how would you say Adidas? Adidas. People are going to be coming for me in the comments.
Oh, how would you say the word basil? Basil.
And last, how would you say the word oregano? Oregano.
